dialogues: Now watch this. Here's the same data as a bar graph.
This category has 30. The picture graph shows 3 symbols. The bar graph shows a bar up to 30. Both graphs show 40 for Yellow Items. Can you find where?
Right. Same data! Picture graphs use symbols. Bar graphs use bars. Both show 40.
Bar graphs are really useful with scale of 10. You read the height instead of counting symbols.
